creator: anarcat@anarcat.ath.cx
text:
I, as the maintainer, approve this patch (in fact I submitted it, just
from another address). :)

A.

On Fri, Nov 28, 2008 at 09:01:12PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of finance/ledgersmb12,

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129262
